holdings.infoBox: FGD is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hyundai Elevator stock at 2.12%, Robert Half at 2.05%, Banco BPM at 1.65%, Telefónica at 1.46%, and Legal & General Group at 1.43%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dow Jones Global Select Dividend Index Fund (FGD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Global Select Dividend index. The fund tracks a yield-weighted index of the top 100 dividend-yielding stocks in 25 developed countries that meet sustainability criteria. FGD was launched on Nov 21, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Dow Jones Global Select Dividend Index
